message:
fix(freeze): Add tail_call detection and limit to single-arg functions

- Add tail_call opcode to self-recursion detection in symbolic_stack
- Disable freezing for multi-arg self-recursive functions (tail_call
  codegen only supports single-arg currently)
- tail_recursive benchmark still fails due to qjsc bytecode issue with
  deep recursion (works for n<100, hangs at n>=1000)

This fixes the missing tail_call detection but reveals that the
tail_call -> goto optimization codegen needs multi-arg support.
